name: Christmas Craft Tree Wood Turned Base - Mondo Llama™
description:
Hone your kid's creativity while adding festive flair to your home decor with this Christmas Craft Tree Wood Turned Base from Mondo Llama™. This craft kit includes a wooden tree that's left unfinished so you or kiddos can decorate it however they please with markers, paints or stickers to create a fun decor piece. Suggested for ages 14+, this freestanding tree makes a fun project for the weekend or a festive gift.

Mondo Llama™: Find your creativity in the making.
